title: City Life in Scottsdale
summary: My mom has spent the last few years working in Scottsdale during the week and spending the weekends at home in Tucson. I had never visited her up in Scottsdale so we decided to add a pit stop for a few days. Upon returning from our camping trip, we went on a nice little hike with my parents and all the dogs at the McDowell Sonoran Preserve. Afterwards, we had dinner at Sofia's Italian Kitchen where I got a delicious bread pudding for dessert. The next day, Helen and I used some guest passes to the (very) fancy gym that my mom likes to go to. We both did an aerial yoga class and used some coupons for a free massage! We've been binge watching the tv show Alone on Netflix, so the rest of the afternoon was spent watching Alone and eating leftovers for dinner with my mom. As I write this, we're getting all packed up and ready to take Helen to the Airport for her trip to Guatemala! Then, I'll head to Tucson to spend some time with my family while Helen is away.
